name: cert_hound_monitor
description: Multi-client SSL certificate monitoring with parallel fan-out and tiered alerting

inputParameters.expression: (function() { var result = []; var clients = $.clients; for (var i = 0; i < clients.length; i++) { result.push({client_name: clients[i].client_name, urls: clients[i].urls, expiration_window_days: $.expiration_window_days}); } return {fork_inputs: result}; })()

(function() { var j = $.join_result || {}; var ew = $.expiration_window_days || 30; var sev = 'healthy'; var failed = []; var expiring = []; for (var key in j) { var c = j[key]; if (!c) continue; var name = c.client_name || key; if (!c.details) { failed.push({client_name: name, reason: 'Sub-workflow failed or returned no details'}); continue; } for (var i = 0; i < c.details.length; i++) { var r = c.details[i]; if (r.error || r.days_remaining <= 7) { sev = 'critical'; expiring.push({client_name: name, url: r.url, days_remaining: r.days_remaining, error: r.error || ''}); } else if (r.days_remaining <= ew) { if (sev !== 'critical') sev = 'warning'; expiring.push({client_name: name, url: r.url, days_remaining: r.days_remaining, error: ''}); } } } return {worst_severity: sev, failed_clients: failed, expiring_certs: expiring}; })()

(function() { var fc = $.failed_clients || []; var tickets = []; for (var i = 0; i < fc.length; i++) { tickets.push({title: fc[i].client_name, description: 'Failure in API: ' + fc[i].reason}); } return {tickets: tickets}; })()

(function() { var certs = $.expiring_certs || []; var lines = []; for (var i = 0; i < certs.length; i++) { var c = certs[i]; lines.push(c.client_name + ' - ' + c.url + ' (' + (c.error || c.days_remaining + ' days remaining') + ')'); } return {service: 'pagerduty', priority: 'P1', message: 'CRITICAL: Certificates need immediate attention', details: lines}; })()

(function() { var certs = $.expiring_certs || []; var lines = []; for (var i = 0; i < certs.length; i++) { var c = certs[i]; lines.push(c.client_name + ' - ' + c.url + ' (' + (c.error || c.days_remaining + ' days remaining') + ')'); } return {service: 'email', to: 'security-team@company.com', subject: 'CRITICAL: Certificate alert', message: 'The following certificates are expired or expiring within 7 days', details: lines}; })()

(function() { var certs = $.expiring_certs || []; var lines = []; for (var i = 0; i < certs.length; i++) { var c = certs[i]; lines.push(c.client_name + ' - ' + c.url + ' (' + c.days_remaining + ' days remaining)'); } return {service: 'slack', channel: '#security-warnings', message: 'WARNING: Certificates expiring soon', details: lines}; })()

(function() { var certs = $.expiring_certs || []; var lines = []; for (var i = 0; i < certs.length; i++) { var c = certs[i]; lines.push(c.client_name + ' - ' + c.url + ' (' + c.days_remaining + ' days remaining)'); } return {service: 'email', to: 'security-team@company.com', subject: 'WARNING: Certificate alert', message: 'The following certificates are expiring within the monitoring window', details: lines}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'slack', channel: '#security-info', message: 'All certificates are healthy'}; })()
